creator: stitzinger_rupert@web.de
text:
problem is still existing under FreeBSD 4.5. When CD-ROM is removed 
(TEAC CD-224E) computer is running without stops.
Problem also occures with line-power use, but not so often.
Computer is freezing for 10s
According to a Linux FAQ this can be due to a not correct electrical 
implementation of the hardware (timing-problems). Also under DOS and 
Linux the machine freezes, but only for ca. .5s. There is something 
called "HeuristicPowerManagement" in the BIOS of this machine.
